sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.shareLinkHint: Share this upload link to your guests or/and use QR-code generator below
sharing.shareNotice: Remember to share the gallery link or QR code with all your guests! Use templates, print QR codes, or create your own designs. Share the link on social media to maximize uploads.
sharing.reminderTip: Enable event reminders so guests can receive the link after your event for day-2 uploads.
sharing.inAppBrowserNote: Don't hesitate to share in social media apps! We display a banner when guests open the link in Facebook, Messenger, Snapchat, or similar in-app browsers, guiding them to open in their main browser (Safari, Chrome, etc.) for best results.

You and co-hosts will still see all photos 👁️, but guests visiting via the link/QR code will be redirected to the gallery and only see liked photos and videos ✨

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Evenero
faq.moreQuestions: Didn't find what you're looking for?

questions.howToCreate: How do I create an event?
questions.howToShare: How do I share my event with guests?
questions.whoCanUpload: Who can upload photos to my event?
questions.howToDownload: How do I download photos from an event?
questions.coHost: Can I add co-hosts to help manage my event?
questions.deletePhotos: Can I delete photos from my event?

answers.whatIsEveneroAnswer: Evenero is a photo sharing platform designed for events like weddings, parties, and gatherings. It allows guests to easily upload their photos and videos, creating a shared collection of memories that everyone can enjoy.
answers.howToCreateAnswer: Log in to your account and click 'Create Event' on your dashboard. Fill in the event details like name, date, and location. You can also add a cover photo to make your event stand out.
answers.howToShareAnswer: Each event has a unique link and QR code. Share the link directly with guests or display the QR code at your event venue. Guests can scan it with their phone to start uploading photos immediately.
answers.whoCanUploadAnswer: By default, anyone with the event link can upload photos. You can also enable email verification to require guests to verify their email before uploading, or add PIN protection for extra security.
answers.howToDownloadAnswer: From the event gallery, you can select individual photos to download or use the 'Download All' option to get a zip file of all photos. For large collections, we'll email you a download link when the zip is ready.
answers.storageLimitsAnswer: Each event includes 150GB of storage for photos and 150GB for videos by default. This is plenty of space for most events. Contact us if you need more storage.
answers.uploadExpiryAnswer: The upload period lasts 12 months from when the event is activated. After this, guests can no longer upload new photos. The gallery remains accessible for 24 months total, giving you plenty of time to download your memories.
answers.pinProtectionAnswer: PIN protection adds an extra layer of security to your event. When enabled, guests need to enter a 4-digit PIN to access the gallery or upload photos. You can share the PIN separately from the event link.
answers.coHostAnswer: Yes! You can invite co-hosts by email. Co-hosts can manage the event, moderate photos, and download content just like you. They can't delete the event or remove you as the owner.
answers.deletePhotosAnswer: As the event owner or co-host, you can select and delete photos from the gallery. Deleted photos are moved to an archive and can be recovered within 30 days.
